metadata.description: Internal Iksula skill & agent marketplace. Subscribe once to receive the firm's standard-compliant skills and their updates.

plugins.name: iksula-agents
plugins.description: Eleven agentic-org skills across Product/Offering + Commercial: vertical-process-mapping, solutions-architect-create, research-solutions, prospect-outreach-research, client-research, thought-leadership, content-creator, media-planner, growth-hacker, lead-gen, and pranaam (the session bootstrap that connects an instance to the Brain). All read/write the shared Brain.
